title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, July 06 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 06/07/2021
Image reference: 2021-07-06_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-july-06-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Mid age Aframax values have softened. VLCCs Nissos Antiparos and Nissos Santorini (319,000 DWT, Jul 2019, Hyundai Heavy Ind) sold to Frontline Ltd in an en bloc deal for USD 180.00 mil, VV en bloc value USD 173.96 mil. VLCC Maran Triton (305,000 DWT, Jul 2003, Hyundai Samho Heavy Ind) sold to Chinese buyers for USD 29.00 mil, VV value USD 29.12 mil.
